title: Radford Global Technology Survey
description: Radford's flagship global technology compensation survey covering software, hardware, SaaS, and emerging tech companies — deep equity and total rewards benchmarks.
countriesRegions: US, Canada, UK, Ireland, Germany, India, China, Japan, Singapore, Australia, Israel, and more
notes: The most widely used tech compensation survey. Extensive equity and RSU benchmarks. Participant list includes thousands of tech companies from pre-revenue to large public. Position/participant details behind Radford Network login.
